textByHash.5a0578aa1296ae773be1147ebe8eb0de610e1504: Miouw...meow. (You have a human Fremennik name, how unusual.)
textByHash.aaa03536f49c60f61b645a0555ae061b66706de2: Meouw! (Well, outlander, one requires a fish immediately.)
textByHash.a06d986b551f71d613b7b99b43b29c77729401c1: Meeeiouw! Mewwww! (Behave yourself human! One shall behave as one likes.)
textByHash.fc03ad9fb8e00a61214800c8262b25aac754029a: MEEEEOOOUW!!!! (Will you stop interrupting one? For the last time one requires tuna immediately.)
textByHash.d046621173b1d25b26f42dc546bc3be1bf18d621: MEEEIOOOOUW! MIOOOOOEW! YOOWLLL! (For goodness' sake! One might acquire the mistaken impression that the human rules this place. I command you to feed me.)
textByHash.b8e1446b440fa26b3105ff7a14a83a0808a4e408: Purrr. (And about time too, insolent human-pet.)
textByHash.54494a2fed95632bc32a94268be300f62cd7fc8b: What is the meaning of this serf? One specifically asked for RAW tuna, not fish defiled by human fire!
textByHash.eb17bd179ece2c9a48663cd9cd5f1f8b48f85e7f: What is the meaning of this serf? How is one supposed to eat a piece of paper?
textByHash.67d1b953619ff7390d004a669f2349339957e2e9: Purrrrrrrrrr (One is satisfied with the freshness of the tuna. The humans have acted satisfactorily in this matter.)
textByHash.bf379fe45a3199c8a4e4da5f45eccb2ba72bbed8: Miouw! (Then get a move on human!!)
textByHash.5431d665539700b715fc216e4ff0bcdf4daf79c7: Meow. (Hmmm, one will lower oneself to eat the fish, despite the human's insult.)
textByHash.13d14b7395976a3e6d8e9573c798f7b53bdbf3fc: Purrr. (One is satisfied with the freshness of the tuna. The humans have acted satisfactorily in this matter.)
textByHash.bd509389ef623d8fc4403308539d9ba3e5ef7c4d: Purrrrz! (One wishes the tuna-bearing outlander well. One would prefer for him to stay.)
textByHash.6736502871e183060b58e03a6ccd25115575f001: Purrrrz! (One wishes the tuna-bearing outlander well. One would prefer for her to stay.)
textByHash.911a8f9e073d347c9f651e95eea2ac929ff64778: One does not wish to be disturbed.
